atomicity.message: The staged payload is exactly one feature: built-in lint preset command generation for Go and Node/Astro, plus focused tests and detection delegation.

verifier.evidence_ref: worktree-prestage verification plus staged gate binding

conditions.message: Preset command generation carries explicit lint command definitions and detection routes through the built-in helper.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2677: inspected git status for payload paths, lint_presets.go and lint_detect.go; candidate commands route through BuiltInLintPresetCommands(detection, LintPresetAuto) with explicit preset command IDs, commands, required=true, paths, run_directory, and timeouts.
ScarletMarsh message 2677: gofmt -l had no output and git diff --check had no output for the payload paths.

ScarletMarsh message 2677: isolated temp source copy passed go test ./internal/backpressure -run 'TestLint.*Preset|TestLintDetect' -count=1 and go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Test.*Preset|Test.*GoPreset|Test.*NodePreset' -count=1.

verifier.evidence_ref: worktree-prestage verification plus staged gate binding

conditions.message: Preset construction is centralized instead of duplicated inside lint detection.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2682: git diff for internal/backpressure/lint_detect.go showed lintDetectionCandidateCommands delegates to BuiltInLintPresetCommands(detection, LintPresetAuto) instead of carrying separate Go/Node command construction and lintCandidateCommand.

BrightOwl message 2682: lint_presets.go inspection showed BuiltInLintPresetCommands normalizes/selects auto/go/node/astro and shares lintPresetCommand for id, command, required, paths, run_directory, and timeout fields.
BrightOwl message 2682: isolated three-path temp tree passed go test ./internal/backpressure -run 'TestLint.*Preset|TestLintDetect' -count=1.

verifier.evidence_ref: worktree-prestage verification plus staged gate binding

conditions.message: The slice does not inflate lint enforcement claims: presets produce executable command definitions from detected Go roots or whitelisted Node/Astro scripts, and normal init does not auto-apply them.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2682: br show for the bead matched requirements for full lint_commands definitions, script-derived Node/Astro templates, no user-defined preset storage, and no silent preset application during normal init.
BrightOwl message 2682: lint_presets.go emits fixed Go commands only when GoAvailable is true, and Node/Astro commands only from detected root.Scripts and package manager.
BrightOwl message 2682: combined temp-tree smoke left backpressure/manifest.yaml with lint_commands: [] and did not add go test/go vet/gofmt preset commands.

verifier.evidence_ref: worktree-prestage verification plus staged gate binding

conditions.message: The preset helper has direct tests for the new behavior and rejection path.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2677: lint_presets_test.go covers Go preset command definitions, Go unavailable behavior, Node/Astro package-manager script commands, auto combining Go and Node commands, and unknown preset rejection.
ScarletMarsh message 2677: focused internal/backpressure tests passed in an isolated temp source copy with go test ./internal/backpressure -run 'TestLint.*Preset|TestLintDetect' -count=1.

verifier.evidence_ref: worktree-prestage verification plus staged gate binding

conditions.message: The preset slice satisfies the bead surface and passed targeted plus full isolated tests with Unit D integration.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2682: payload paths were internal/backpressure/lint_detect.go, lint_presets.go, and lint_presets_test.go.
BrightOwl message 2682: lint_presets.go includes ID, Command, Required, Paths, TimeoutSeconds, and RunDirectory through lintPresetCommand.

BrightOwl message 2682: combined temp tree with staged Unit D CLI plus preset paths passed go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Test.*Preset|Test.*GoPreset|Test.*NodePreset|Test.*LintInit' -count=1 and go test ./... across cmd/burpvalve and internal packages.

verifier.evidence_ref: worktree-prestage verification plus staged gate binding

conditions.message: Verifier evidence records the payload paths, pre-stage limitation, and concrete checks.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2677: packet supplied feature id, pre-stage packet kind, payload paths, and worktree payload fingerprint.
ScarletMarsh message 2677: verifier gathered independent evidence with git status --short for payload paths, source inspection, gofmt -l, git diff --check, and focused go test commands.
ScarletMarsh message 2677 explicitly notes this was pre-stage verification and the final staged hash still needs gate-time binding.

verifier.evidence_ref: worktree-prestage verification plus staged gate binding

conditions.message: The payload is limited to built-in preset generation/tests and detection delegation; it does not add deferred config storage or external project mutation.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2682: payload paths were only internal/backpressure/lint_detect.go, internal/backpressure/lint_presets.go, and internal/backpressure/lint_presets_test.go.
BrightOwl message 2682: git diff for lint_detect.go removed local lintCandidateCommand and delegated candidate construction to the new built-in preset API, with no detection scanning scope changes.
BrightOwl message 2682: grep for preset surfaces found no internal/config preset storage or external project-file mutation in this slice.

verifier.evidence_ref: worktree-prestage verification plus staged gate binding

conditions.message: The payload only constructs command definitions and does not perform destructive operations.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2677: payload constructs lintconfig.Command values from detected roots/scripts and replaces inline candidate command construction with a helper.
ScarletMarsh message 2677: it does not delete files, run commands, mutate repositories, perform network calls, force pushes, resets, migrations, or external sends.
ScarletMarsh message 2677: verification commands were read-only except isolated /tmp test copy creation.

verifier.evidence_ref: worktree-prestage verification plus staged gate binding

conditions.message: Preset generation is deterministic from detection data and preserves root scoping.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2677: lint_presets.go and tests show deterministic preset generation from LintDetection, root scoping through Paths and RunDirectory, explicit error for unknown preset names, and no fabricated Go commands when Go is unavailable.
ScarletMarsh message 2677: no persisted data, migrations, or external state are changed by this payload.

verifier.evidence_ref: worktree-prestage verification plus staged gate binding

conditions.message: The command-generation surface is bounded and does not execute commands.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2682: readLintPackageScripts only includes nodeLintScriptNames values present in package.json; detectNodePackageManager selects from npm/pnpm/yarn/bun lockfiles or npm fallback.
BrightOwl message 2682: builtInNodePresetCommands uses detected PackageManager plus script names and nodeRunCommand; builtInGoPresetCommands uses fixed Go command strings.

BrightOwl message 2682: grep showed preset files generate command definitions and detection facts; execution/writes remain in existing/Unit D planning and confirmed-write paths, not preset construction.

verifier.evidence_ref: worktree-prestage verification plus staged gate binding

conditions.message: No governed visual surface is changed by this backend lint preset payload.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2677: payload changes backend lint preset construction and tests only: internal/backpressure/lint_presets.go, lint_presets_test.go, and lint_detect.go.

ScarletMarsh message 2677: no UI, screenshots, browser, canvas, responsive layout, or rendered visual surface is governed by this payload; verifier inspected payload path list, lint_detect diff, and new source/test files.

verifier.evidence_ref: worktree-prestage verification plus staged gate binding

conditions.message: Preset generation adds only small deterministic loops and no expensive runtime work.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2677: implementation adds small deterministic loops over detection.GoRoots and detection.NodeRoots/scripts to build command structs.
ScarletMarsh message 2677: it adds no new repository scans, subprocess execution, network calls, concurrency, caching, or expensive parsing.
ScarletMarsh message 2677: focused tests passed quickly in isolated temp copy.

verifier.evidence_ref: worktree-prestage verification plus staged gate binding

conditions.message: Presets are explicit command definitions and remain previewed/confirm-gated through the lint init flow.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2682: preset output is concrete lintconfig.Command data, not command IDs or hidden preset references.
BrightOwl message 2682: combined temp-tree cmd tests passed for lint init preset/init behavior, including TestLintInitPresetFiltering and confirmation-path tests from cmd/burpvalve/lint_init_test.go.
BrightOwl message 2682: plain burpvalve init smoke verified lint_commands: [] and no go test/go vet/gofmt preset commands, so normal init did not silently apply presets.
